result:
Here's a summary of all changes made to remove the compact layout filter from the Posts section:

## Files Deleted
1. **`WordPress/src/main/res/layout/post_list_item_compact.xml`** - Compact post item layout
2. **`WordPress/src/main/res/layout/post_list_item_skeleton_compact.xml`** - Compact loading skeleton layout
3. **`WordPress/src/main/res/drawable/ic_view_post_compact_white_24dp.xml`** - Compact view toggle icon
4. **`WordPress/src/main/res/drawable/ic_view_post_full_white_24dp.xml`** - Standard view toggle icon
5. **`WordPress/src/main/java/.../ui/posts/PostListViewLayoutType.kt`** - The STANDARD/COMPACT enum

## Files Modified

### String resources
- **`WordPress/src/main/res/values/strings.xml`** - Removed `post_list_toggle_item_layout_cards_view` and `post_list_toggle_item_layout_list_view` strings
- **`fastlane/resources/values/strings.xml`** - Same string removals

### View layer
- **`PostListMainViewState.kt`** - Removed the entire `PostListViewLayoutTypeMenuUiState` sealed class
- **`PostListFragment.kt`** - Removed `viewLayoutType` observer, removed compact/standard item decorations, now uses a single standard decoration applied once in `onCreateView`
- **`PostListAdapter.kt`** - Removed `VIEW_TYPE_POST_COMPACT` and `VIEW_TYPE_LOADING_COMPACT` constants, removed `itemLayoutType` field, simplified `getItemViewType()` and `onCreateViewHolder()`, removed `updateItemLayoutType()` method
- **`PostListItemViewHolder.kt`** - Removed `Compact` inner class, removed unused `ImageButton` and `expandTouchTargetArea` imports

### ViewModel
- **`PostListMainViewModel.kt`** - Removed `_viewLayoutType` and `_viewLayoutTypeMenuUiState` LiveData fields, removed `toggleViewLayout()`, `setViewLayoutAndIcon()`, and `setUserPreferredViewLayoutType()` methods, removed compact layout calls from `start()`, `onSearchExpanded()`, and `onSearchCollapsed()`

### Preferences
- **`AppPrefsWrapper.kt`** - Removed `postListViewLayoutType` property
- **`AppPrefs.java`** - Removed `POST_LIST_VIEW_LAYOUT_TYPE` from `DeletablePrefKey`, removed `getPostsListViewLayoutType()` and `setPostsListViewLayoutType()` methods

### Analytics
- **`AnalyticsUtils.java`** - Removed `trackAnalyticsPostListToggleLayout()` method
- **`AnalyticsTracker.java`** - Removed `POST_LIST_VIEW_LAYOUT_TOGGLED` enum value
- **`AnalyticsTrackerNosara.java`** - Removed corresponding case in the switch statement

### Migration
- **`UserFlagsProviderHelper.kt`** - Removed `POST_LIST_VIEW_LAYOUT_TYPE` from the migration list

### Tests
- **`PostListMainViewModelTest.kt`** - Removed the `search is using compact view mode independently from normal post list` test, removed `postListViewLayoutType` mock setup, cleaned up unused imports
